title: S + V + to V 或 V-ing（兩者皆可）

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 動詞 + 不定詞
主詞 + 動詞 + 動名詞

explanation: 此句型涵蓋可接不定詞或動名詞的動詞。某些動詞（like, start, begin, continue）接兩種形式意思相同；某些動詞（remember, forget, stop, try）接兩種形式意思差異大。remember to V表「記得要去做」，remember V-ing表「記得曾經做過」；stop to V表「停下來去做」，stop V-ing表「停止做某事」。使用時須注意語境判斷動詞後應用何種形式。

examples.eng: I like reading novels because they help me relax after school.
examples.chi: 我喜歡讀小說，因為它們幫助我在放學後放鬆。

examples.eng: She remembered to bring her passport when traveling abroad last summer.
examples.chi: 她在去年夏天出國旅遊時記得帶上護照。

examples.eng: He stopped smoking to improve his health and fitness.
examples.chi: 他戒菸以改善他的健康和體能。

examples.eng: We started to learn about environmental protection in primary school.
examples.chi: 我們從小學開始學習關於環境保護的知識。

extension.tip: 判斷關鍵：remember/forget/stop 接不定詞或動名詞時意思差異最大。remember to V=記得去做（未做），remember V-ing=記得曾做（已做）。stop to V=停下來去做另一事，stop V-ing=停止正在做的事。context決定選擇。

examples.test: I remembered to call my mother. vs I remembered calling my mother.
examples.result: → 前者：我記得(要)打給媽媽（可能還未打）；後者：我記得打過給媽媽（已打過）

examples.test: He stopped to chat with his friend. vs He stopped chatting with his friend.
examples.result: → 前者：他停下來與朋友聊天（做新動作）；後者：他停止與朋友聊天（終止動作）

examples.test: She tried to open the door. vs She tried opening the door.
examples.result: → 前者：她試圖打開門（嘗試一次）；後者：她試著打開門（嘗試不同方法）

extension.note: remember/forget/stop 意思變：to V=未來/未做，V-ing=過去/已做；like/start/continue 意思同：兩者可互換。

parts: to watching television in my free time.
exercises.sentence: I prefer reading to watching television in my free time.
exercises.translation: 在空閒時間裡，我喜歡看書而不喜歡看電視。

exercises.sentence: She forgot to bring her keys at home yesterday.
exercises.translation: 她昨天忘記帶鑰匙在家。

parts: their homework even though it was late.
exercises.sentence: The children continued doing their homework even though it was late.
exercises.translation: 儘管很晚了，孩子們仍繼續做功課。

parts: the engine, but it wouldn't start.
exercises.sentence: He tried to start the engine, but it wouldn't start.
exercises.translation: 他試圖啟動引擎，但它就是不動。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的動詞形式完成句子，表達喜歡閱讀的習慣。
mc_exercises.question_eng: I really like _______ novels in my free time because they help me relax.
mc_exercises.explanation: like 接不定詞或動名詞意思相同，但動名詞形式更常用於表達一般性的習慣或喜好。B 正確。A 也可接受但較少用；C 缺少 to；D 語法不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據語境選擇正確形式，強調記得曾經做過的事。
mc_exercises.question_eng: I clearly remember _______ that beautiful sunset on the beach last summer with my friends.
mc_exercises.explanation: remember + V-ing 表「記得曾經做過」，suited 過去的經驗。B 正確。A(remember to V)表「記得要去做」，不符語境；C、D 語法不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據語境判斷 stop 的含義，選擇正確形式。
mc_exercises.question_eng: When the teacher entered the classroom, all the students _______ talking immediately.
mc_exercises.explanation: stop + V-ing 表「停止做某事」，符合語境「學生停止講話」。B 正確。A(stop to V)表「停下來去做」，意思相反；C 時態不當；D 時態搭配不適。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據語句邏輯選擇形式，區分「嘗試去做」與「試著做」的差異。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She tried _______ the old lock with the rusty key, and after several attempts, she finally managed to open the door.
mc_exercises.explanation: try + V-ing 表「試著做某事」(嘗試的過程)，符合「她多次嘗試開鎖」的語境。B 正確。A(try to V)強調「努力去做」目標導向；C、D 時態與語境不符。

translation_exercises.answer: I like watching movies on weekends. / I like to watch movies on weekends.
key_points: 週末時間介系詞 on weekends
hints: 句型框架：S + like + (to V / V-ing) + O
注意：like 後接動名詞或不定詞均可，意思相同

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她記得曾經參加過那場音樂會。
translation_exercises.answer: She remembers attending that concert. / She remembers having attended that concert.
key_points: remember + V-ing 表『記得曾經做過』
hints: 句型框架：S + remember + V-ing（表過去已發生的事）
易錯點：remember + V-ing 強調『曾經發生過』的回憶，不是『要去做』的計畫

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 考試前，他停止玩遊戲，開始複習功課。
translation_exercises.answer: Before the exam, he stopped playing video games and started reviewing his lessons. / Before the exam, he stopped playing video games and started to review his lessons.
key_points: stop + V-ing 表『停止做某事』
start / begin + to V / V-ing 皆可
hints: 句型框架：S + stop + V-ing（終止某動作）；S + start/begin + (to V / V-ing)（開始新動作）
易錯點：stop 後務必用 V-ing，不能用 to V；start/begin 兩種形式都接受

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師要求學生記得要繳交作業，但有些學生忘記提交了。他們試著補交，卻停下來思考是否還有時間。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher asked students to remember to submit their homework, but some students forgot submitting it. They tried to resubmit, but stopped to think about whether there was enough time.
key_points: remember to V 表『記得要去做』的未來動作
forget + V-ing 表『忘記曾經做過』
stop to V 表『停下來去做』新動作
try to V / try + V-ing 兩者意思略異
hints: 句型框架：remember to V（未來）vs. forget + V-ing（過去）；stop to V（為了做某事而停止）vs. stop + V-ing（停止做某動作）
易錯點：remember/forget 後的形式決定時態概念；stop to V 後的動作是『目的』，stop V-ing 後的動作是『被終止的動作』
